setup.requirement: Playwright MCP Server must be running and accessible

file.name: Setup
file.description: Follow setup instructions from this file

file.name: Regression21.csv
file.description: Test suite containing all test cases to execute

step.description: Ensure Playwright MCP server is running and ready for automation
Go to VCST_FRONT_URL using Playwright MCP server
Run command npm run env:check for upload variables from .env file and sign in as USER2_EMAIL using standard login form
Press F12 to open Dev Tools > Console and keep it open throughout testing

step.action: Make a full regression. Without stopping. Execute Test Suite
step.description: Run regression testing following Regression21.csv test cases

sections.section: Sign in form (on the Main and Sign in pages)
Catalog page. Check FACETS AND CHIPS
Catalog page. Check AVAILABLE AT BRANCHES
Catalog page. Check AVAILABLE IN STOCK
Product details page. Check product details
Product details page. Check product images
Product details page. Check product properties
Product details page. Check product descriptions
Product details page. Check product related products
Product details page. Check product price
Product details page. Check product stock
Product details page. Check product add to cart
Product details page. Check product add to wishlist
Product details page. Check product add to compare
Product details page. Check product add to list
Cart and Checkout. Update products QUANTITY in cart
Cart and Checkout. Remove products from cart
Cart and Checkout. create order. Use file orderCreationMatrix.csv to create order
Anonymous user access to the store
Search page and search results page
Search page and search results page. Check filters
Search page and search results page. Check sorting
Search page and search results page. Check pagination
Profile. Edit profile. Change language and currency
Ship To. Check show more button

step.description: For Admin site/Back office scenarios, open second tab and navigate to BACK_URL
After each action, check console for JavaScript errors and fetch errors. Print all found errors immediately
After testing completion, click on User name in upper right corner and click Logout icon

testing_methodology.approach: Compare expected results vs actual results for each test case

test_case_format.id: Test Case ID from csv file
test_case_format.title: Test Case Title
test_case_format.steps: Execute steps as defined in csv file

format.detailed_errors: List any errors, console messages, or discrepancies found

bug_reports.condition: Create bug report when discrepancies are found

format.test_case_id: Reference Test Case ID from csv file

test_data_source.total_test_cases: Extract from csv file and execute systematically

success_criteria.criterion: All test cases executed using Playwright MCP server
All console errors captured and reported
Bug reports created for any found issues
